summary: All 6 dashboard pages have been fully tested with Demo Mode. All previously 'Coming Soon' buttons are now wired to real functionality with mock data. Research Engine shows AI analysis with trend/confidence/risk/indicators. Strategy Lab generates strategies and runs backtests with metrics. AI Agents has working Configure and View Signals modals. Event Agents has Pause/Resume toggle, Log modal, and Events modal. Marketplace has Preview modal with performance chart and Install functionality. Simulation has Backtest tab with PnL curve and metrics. No 'Coming Soon' toasts appear on any wired button.
passed_tests: Research Engine (/research?demo=true): Research button triggers AI result panel
Research Engine: Result panel shows summary, trend (bullish), confidence (78%), risk (medium), indicators
Research Engine: Asset selector (BTC/ETH/SOL) changes query context
Research Engine: Enter key in input field triggers research
Research Engine: Close button (X) on result panel hides it
Strategy Lab (/lab?demo=true): Generate Strategy button creates strategy card
Strategy Lab: Generated strategy shows name, type, parameters (lookback, threshold, risk_level)
Strategy Lab: Strategy type selector (momentum, mean_reversion, etc.) works
Strategy Lab: Backtest button on generated strategy shows results
Strategy Lab: Backtest result shows Total Return (18.5%), Sharpe Ratio (1.92), Max Drawdown (4.2%), Win Rate (64.3%)
AI Agents (/agents?demo=true): Configure button opens modal with asset, timeframe, risk level, signal frequency options
AI Agents: Save configuration in modal shows toast and closes modal
AI Agents: Config badges appear on card after saving
AI Agents: View Signals button opens modal with signal list
AI Agents: Signals show LONG/SHORT type, asset, confidence percentage, status
AI Agents: Deploy Agent button shows toast message
Event Agents (/events?demo=true): Pause button dims card and changes to Resume
Event Agents: Resume button reactivates agent
Event Agents: View Log button opens modal with timestamped log entries
Event Agents: View All events button opens macro events modal with 6 events and impact levels
Marketplace (/marketplace?demo=true): Preview button opens modal with description
Marketplace: Preview modal shows monthly returns chart (12 bars)
Marketplace: Preview modal shows metrics (Sharpe, Max DD, Win Rate)
Marketplace: Install button shows success toast and closes modal
Marketplace: Search input filters items
Simulation (/simulation?demo=true): Backtest tab shows pair and strategy selectors
Simulation: Run Backtest button shows loading state then results
Simulation: Backtest result shows equity curve (30 data points)
Simulation: Backtest result shows Total Return, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate
Simulation: Additional stats show Total Trades, Profit Factor, Capital change
All modals can be closed by clicking X button
No 'Coming Soon' toasts appear on any wired button
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 pages properly implement Demo Mode with mock data fallbacks
Research Engine has real GPT-5.2 backend endpoint POST /api/research/ai-query
All modals use AnimatePresence for smooth open/close animations
Proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
Toast notifications from sonner appear correctly at bottom-right
seed_data_creation: None - used Demo Mode mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 dashboard pages fully functional with Demo Mode. Key test-ids: research-btn, research-result, research-input, asset-btc/eth/sol, generate-strategy-btn, generated-strategy, backtest-result, configure-agent-{i}, config-modal, save-config-btn, signals-modal, view-signals-{i}, pause-agent-{i}, view-log-{i}, log-modal, view-all-events-btn, events-modal, install-item-{i}, preview-modal, confirm-install-btn, marketplace-search, run-backtest-btn, bt-pair-BTCUSDT, bt-strat-momentum. All features use MOCKED data in Demo Mode.

mocked_apis_list: Demo Mode mock data for all 6 pages
Research Engine DEMO_RESULT constant for AI analysis
Strategy Lab client-side generated backtest results
Event Agents MOCK_EVENTS and MOCK_LOG arrays
Simulation client-side generated backtest with random metrics
